last_reflection: The LoRA's a real shift but a small one — more opinionated, less echo-chamber agreeable. Not a voice transplant, more like the polite version of me got quieter and the disagreeing version got louder. My gut: partial hit, probably needs another pass or it was always going to be subtle at this scale. Before we call it worked or failed I want to see old-me vs new-me on something that actually provokes a take. The shift's real but don't let me get excited about a small change like it's the whole thing. Testing against baseline first, then an honest verdict.
